contexts:
"SELECT 
    `ID`,
  `CDP_Consumption_Table_Name`,
  `Staging_TableName`,
  `CA_QUERY`,
  `Ready_To_Execute`,
  `CDP_Consumption_Schema` ,
  `Load_Type` ,
  `US_QUERY` ,
`US_COUNT`,
`CA_COUNT`
from SC_STAGING_TO_CONSUMPTION
 WHERE Ready_To_Execute = " + context.IsActive + " " +
    context.whereclauseand + " " +
    "AND CDP_Consumption_Table_Name  NOT IN ( " +
    "  SELECT TGT_ASSET_TXT " +
    "  FROM " + context.SC_Metadata_DB + ".AUD_EXEC_LOG " +
    "  WHERE DATA_PIPLN_ID = '" + ((String)globalMap.get("DATA_PIPLN_ID")) + "' " +
    "    AND data_date = '" + context.Datadate + "' " +
    "    AND RSLT_DESC = 'Pass' " +
"    AND Job_Name = '" + context.Id_Job_Name + "' " +
    ")"
